hero.title: The Perfume Lab
hero.subtitle: A Private Perfumery Experience
hero.description: The private tools of master perfumers. Now in your hands.
hero.note: Each composition is blended individually. No two formulas are ever identical.

features.identityDesc: A guided journey to uncover your unique fragrance archetype and personal signature.
features.worldsDesc: Curated olfactory realms — each with its own palette, mood, and raw materials.
features.atelierDesc: Compose with precision. Every blend is produced by hand in small weekly batches.

cta.title: Your Signature Awaits
cta.description: Thousands of possible combinations. One that's unmistakably you. Our AI-guided Scent Lab walks you through every layer — top, heart, base — until your vision becomes a bottle.
cta.note: Most creators can't stop at just one.

quiz.title: What's Your Scent Identity?
quiz.description: Answer 5 quick questions and our AI perfumer will map your unique fragrance archetype — from the notes you'll love to the worlds you belong in.
quiz.profileSubtitle: Tell us what you love so we can personalize your recommendations.

testimonials.title: What Our Creators Say
testimonials.sophia: I've spent thousands on niche fragrances. Nothing comes close to wearing something that was built molecule by molecule around my personality.
testimonials.james: The Formulation Lab is addictive. I've created 6 blends so far — each one tells a different story. The precision is unlike anything else.
testimonials.amira: As a creative director, I need my scent to be as intentional as my work. The Perfume Lab gave me exactly that — a signature no one else has.
testimonials.marcus: From the onboarding quiz to the final bottle, every step felt like a luxury experience. This isn't perfume shopping — it's perfume creation.

footer.copyright: © 2026 The Perfume Lab — Each composition is blended individually in our atelier.

mathModule.title: Quick Commission Math
mathModule.subtitle: Understand the payout per bottle, how shop shares work and simple monthly scenarios.
mathModule.point1: Shop gets 40% of retail. If retail price = R, shop gets 0.40 × R. The remainder to the company is 0.60 × R.
mathModule.point2: Affiliate gets 10% of the company remainder. That means affiliate per-bottle = 0.10 × (0.60 × R) = 0.06 × R.
mathModule.point3: For R = €60 → affiliate = 0.06 × 60 = €3.60. Memorize €3.60 for our flagship product.
mathModule.practiceQuestion: Calculate the affiliate earning per bottle for R = €50.
mathModule.continueCta: I understand — continue to Math Quiz

mathQuiz.title: Commission Math Quiz
mathQuiz.subtitle: Question {{current}}/{{total}} — Score ≥6/7 to pass (~5 min)
mathQuiz.passedMessage: Super — you're cleared to reserve your Starter Pack.
mathQuiz.failedRetry: You can retry {{remaining}} more time(s). Review the Quick Math module first.
mathQuiz.failedMaxAttempts: You've used all 3 attempts. Book a 15-minute coaching session to continue.
mathQuiz.failedToast: Quiz not passed — review and retry.
mathQuiz.Q1: If a perfume costs €60 and the shop gets 40%, how much does the affiliate earn per bottle (10% after the shop share)?
mathQuiz.Q2: You have 64 buying shops and each buys 10 bottles/month. What is your monthly earnings?
mathQuiz.Q2exp: 64 × 10 × €3.60 = 640 × 3.6 = €2,304. Tip: increase units/shop or shops signed to reach €4k.
mathQuiz.Q3: Which metric increases your income the most if you improve it?
mathQuiz.Q3exp: Units per shop is a linear multiplier. A 50% increase in units/shop gives bigger impact than a small bump in visits.
mathQuiz.Q4: You do 400 visits/month. If 20% buy (80 shops), how many bottles per shop are required to reach €4,000/month?
mathQuiz.Q5: The affiliate commission is calculated from the company remainder AFTER the 40% shop share, not directly from the retail price.
mathQuiz.Q5exp: Correct. Commission = 10% of (retail − 40% shop share) = 10% of 60% of retail = 6% of retail.
mathQuiz.Q6: You get a €60 activation bonus per shop and €3.60 per bottle. With 80 shops and 15 bottles per shop, what is total earnings?
mathQuiz.Q7: If a salon is unsure, which tactic reduces perceived risk the most and improves acceptance of starter pack?
mathQuiz.Q7o2: Show big logo & promise social media posts
mathQuiz.Q7o3: 14-day buyback guarantee + short staff sales training
mathQuiz.Q7o4: Ask them to pay full price immediately
mathQuiz.Q7exp: Guarantee + training reduces risk and increases sell-through.
